title: Fix Supabase redirect: production app redirects to hosted Supabase on login
description: The production app at ai-listings.napoleon-catfish.ts.net redirects to supabase.co (hosted Supabase) during auth instead of staying on the self-hosted k8s instance. Likely cause: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL in k8s ConfigMap or Supabase SITE_URL pointing to cloud URL.
close_reason: Not a bug — user was opening the wrong URL. Self-hosted k8s Supabase is working correctly.

title: Pipeline stuck after Step 2 (pricing research / Step 3 never starts)
description: User created a new listing (Louis Vuitton sneakers). Pipeline completes Step 2 (vision analysis, Brand: Louis Vuitton, Category: Sneakers) but Step 3 never starts. Logs end at 'Step 2 complete'. Nothing after. Need to trace why Step 3 isn't being triggered or is silently failing.
close_reason: Added ID gate confirmation UI to workspace — pending step.waitForEvent now unblocks via confirmId suggestion or typed correction intercepted in AgentChat.sendMessage

title: Fix Dockerfile to copy packages/ before npm ci
description: The Dockerfile's deps and builder stages run npm ci before copying packages/, but root package.json declares @local/poshmark-seller-sdk as a file: workspace. npm ci fails because the workspace's package.json isn't in the build context yet. CI for PR #2 (gh run 26208241452) failed because of this.
close_reason: Dockerfile and package-lock.json fixed; image built and deployed manually (sha256:9f3ae94d). CI still broken due to GHCR 403 — tracked in ai_listings-bng.

title: DB migrations: watches/keyboards categories, user_settings, notifications, messages, listing_platforms
description: Create migration 0004 covering: watches+keyboards category constraint additions, WA+KB sku_counters, user_settings table with type column, notifications table, messages table, listing_platforms table, reddit source in pricing_comps.
close_reason: Migration 0004 written, applied to k8s Postgres, committed to feature/platform-expansion

title: New product types: watches and keyboards
description: Add watches and keyboards categories to TypeScript types, step1 inference regexes, step2 Claude enum + LUXURY_BRANDS (Movado et al) + photo plan hints, step5 watch auth steps.

title: Test studio photo BG removal end-to-end
description: studioPhotoProcess Inngest function is wired up but never exercised. Upload a studio photo, confirm studio/uploaded event fires, confirm processed_url gets set on the photo row, confirm workspace first-message shows BG-running state on reload.

title: Verify photos_confirmed DB column is live
description: The photos_confirmed migration was applied via kubectl exec (returned ALTER TABLE) but never verified. Run: kubectl exec -n sup-ai-listings ai-listings-supabase-db-0 -- psql -U postgres -d postgres -c 'SELECT photos_confirmed FROM listings LIMIT 1;'

title: Pricing: retail price lookup and promo detection
description: After computing resale comps in step3, also fetch the current new retail price using SerpAPI google_shopping with condition=new. Detect active sales/promos (price delta >10%). Store retail_price_cents, retail_price_source, retail_promo_note on listings. Display in EvidenceDrawer as 'Retails new for $X at [source]' with promo note if found.
close_reason: Closed

title: Pricing: speed-to-sell price (price to move faster)
description: Median comp price is the fair price, but sellers who want faster turnover need a second price point. Compute price_to_move_cents in step3 as median * (1 - category_discount_pct) with per-category overrides (handbag 15%, watches 12%, electronics 20%, clothing 25%). Store in new listings columns price_to_move_cents and price_to_move_discount_pct. Display in EvidenceDrawer below suggested price with explanation.
close_reason: Closed

title: Alt ingestion: text/UPC/URL intake flow
description: Not every item is photo-first. Add a second intake path that skips photo upload and accepts free-text descriptions, UPC/EAN barcodes, or product page URLs to bootstrap a listing. \n\nNew UI: dashboard modal with two options (upload photos / describe item). New API route POST /api/intake-text. New Inngest function text-intake-pipeline that skips step1, constructs synthetic step1Result, then runs steps 2-5 as normal. UPC resolution via upcdatabase.org or barcodelookup.com. URL resolution via fetch + OG/schema.org metadata.
close_reason: Closed

title: Smoke test new features in browser after deployment
description:
After deploying PR #2 (multi-platform reseller SDK + workspace features), the automated browser smoke test was blocked by Google OAuth anti-bot detection on fresh profiles. All backend checks passed. Need a human to manually walk the 6 flows in their regular signed-in browser.

## Flows to verify
1. Dashboard loads with NotificationBell in layout header
2. Bell click opens NotificationPanel (empty state OK)
3. /settings/platforms renders PlatformSettings with all 6 platform credential forms
4. Workspace: photo upload in chat, quick-reply tiles, editable inclusions, pipeline timeline
5. Comps with no sold_at show — (em dash) not '56y ago'
6. Studio BG removal: upload photo, trigger BG removal, result appears

## Already verified (no auth needed)
- New pod running sha256:9f3ae94d
- All 8 Inngest functions registered (3 new sync-platform-*)
- Migration 0004 applied (all 6 new tables)
- Boot logs clean
- HTTP 200/307 as expected
- NotificationBell + platform refs in SSR'd /dashboard HTML

title: Link ai-listings container package to repo to fix CI GHCR 403
description:
Both GITHUB_TOKEN and GHCR_PAT fail with 403 Forbidden on HEAD blob requests when pushing ghcr.io/joeblackwaslike/ai-listings. Root cause: the container package was originally created by a different identity (likely a manual PAT push) and the ai-listings repo doesn't have Actions write access to the package.

Fix: Visit https://github.com/users/joeblackwaslike/packages/container/ai-listings/settings -> Manage Actions access -> Add Repository -> select joeblackwaslike/ai-listings with Write role.

After the fix, retrigger the failed deploy workflow: gh run rerun <run-id> or just push a trivial commit.

Until this is fixed, every push to main will fail CI and require a manual local build via deployment/scripts/build.sh.

title: Platform SDK MCP server
description: Implement src/lib/platforms/mcp-server.ts exposing all platform SDK operations as MCP tools. Allows Claude agent to call createListing, getOrders, searchSoldComps etc. on any registered platform. Source: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-20-reseller-sdk-architecture-design.md §MCP Server.
close_reason: MCP server: 7 platform tools (search_comps, create_listing, get_orders, get_notifications, get_threads, send_message, mark_shipped) exposed via stdio JSON-RPC 2.0 and HTTP API route. Dispatches to platform adapters by platform+userId.

title: Inngest polling jobs: orders, notifications, messages
description: Implement three Inngest functions: sync-platform-orders (every 15min), sync-platform-notifications (every 5min), sync-platform-messages (every 5min). Each iterates registered platforms, calls adapter methods, upserts to DB tables (notifications, messages, orders), triggers Supabase realtime. Source: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-20-core-features-design.md §4. Location: src/inngest/functions/.
close_reason: Three Inngest cron jobs: sync-platform-notifications (5min), sync-platform-messages (5min), sync-platform-orders (15min). Fixes: JSONB filter syntax for dedup, message notification dedup, silent skip for UnsupportedOperationError

title: TheRealReal adapter: Apify scraper for watch comps
description: Implement src/lib/platforms/adapters/therealreal.ts. Read-only adapter — only searchSoldComps via Apify lexis-solutions/therealreal-com-scraper. All other PlatformSDK methods throw UnsupportedOperationError. Source: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-20-therealreal-integration-design.md.
close_reason: TRR read-only adapter: searchSoldComps via Apify lexis-solutions/therealreal-com-scraper with polling, filters Sold items; all mutating methods throw UnsupportedOperationError

title: mechmarket platform adapter: snoowrap + Imgur
description: Implement src/lib/platforms/adapters/mechmarket.ts. Multi-item post model using mechmarket_posts/mechmarket_post_items tables. snoowrap for Reddit API. Imgur for image upload. 48h cooldown enforcement between posts. Timestamp photo upload required. No direct listing CRUD (posts contain multiple items). getOrders/searchSoldComps via Reddit search. Source: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-20-mechmarket-integration-design.md.
close_reason: mechmarket adapter: snoowrap+Imgur, 48h cooldown, multi-item post model, Reddit messaging, timestamp photo upload; fixes: imgurClientSecret, album URL, user isolation, DB error propagation

title: Etsy platform adapter: v3 REST API
description: Implement src/lib/platforms/adapters/etsy.ts. Use direct fetch against Etsy v3 REST API (https://openapi.etsy.com/v3). OAuth token via getSetting('etsy_access_token'/'etsy_refresh_token'). POST /application/shops/{shop_id}/listings to create (state=draft), PATCH /application/listings/{id} to activate. Image upload separately: POST /application/shops/{shop_id}/listings/{id}/images. getOrders via GET /application/shops/{shop_id}/receipts. Webhook handler src/app/api/webhooks/etsy/route.ts with HMAC-SHA256 verification. No messaging API — getThreads/getThread/sendMessage throw UnsupportedOperationError. searchSoldComps via SerpAPI Google Shopping (site:etsy.com). Source: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-20-etsy-integration-design.md and src/lib/platforms/types.ts.
close_reason: Etsy v3 REST adapter: OAuth2 token refresh with caching, full CRUD, orders/tracking, webhook handler with HMAC-SHA256; messaging throws UnsupportedOperationError

title: Mercari platform adapter: Shops GraphQL API
description: Implement src/lib/platforms/adapters/mercari.ts. Install graphql-request. Use Mercari Shops GraphQL API (https://api.mercari-shops.com/v1/graphql) for createListing/updateListing/deleteListing/getMyListings/getOrders/markShipped. Use consumer API search endpoint for searchSoldComps (reverse-engineered). Messaging stubs. Source: mercari-integration-design.md.
close_reason: Mercari adapter: Shops GraphQL API for CRUD/orders, consumer API for sold comps, graphql-request, condition mapping, build clean

title: Poshmark platform adapter: wrap existing poshmark-seller-sdk
description: Implement src/lib/platforms/adapters/poshmark.ts wrapping the local SDK at /Users/joe/Documents/Playground/packages/poshmark-seller-sdk. Implement: getMyListings/getListing/updateListing using existing SDK methods. Parse getSalesPage() HTML with cheerio for getOrders. Stub createListing/deleteListing/getNotifications with best-effort implementation based on spec's known endpoint patterns. Wire up credential loading from user_settings poshmark_cookies.
close_reason: Poshmark adapter wraps poshmark-seller-sdk: getMyListings/getListing/updateListing delegated, getOrders parses HTML with cheerio, unimplemented endpoints stubbed with UnsupportedOperationError

title: eBay platform adapter: Sell Inventory + Fulfillment APIs

Implement: createListing (3-step: PUT inventory item, POST offer, POST publish), updateListing, deleteListing, getListing, getMyListings via Sell Inventory API. getOrders/getOrder/markShipped via Sell Fulfillment API. getNotifications via webhook handler at src/app/api/webhooks/ebay/route.ts. getThreads/getThread/sendMessage via Trading API messaging. Condition + category ID mapping as per spec.
close_reason: eBay adapter implemented: Sell Inventory 3-step publish, Fulfillment API, token caching, webhook with HMAC-SHA256 verification. Build clean.

title: Fix Serena MCP not connecting

title: Obtain eBay user refresh token
description: EBAY_USER_REFRESH_TOKEN is blank in both .env.local and .env.production.local. Without it, user-scoped eBay API calls (listing creation, orders) won't work. Need to complete the OAuth flow to get a refresh token and store it in both env files and the k8s secret.

title: Redeploy app to k8s after env changes
description: Both .env.local and .env.production.local were updated this session (k8s Supabase URLs, JWT keys, Inngest keys). The k8s Secret and ConfigMap may not reflect all changes. Need to: 1) compare current k8s secret values vs .env.production.local 2) apply any diffs via kubectl 3) trigger rolling restart of the ai-listings deployment.

title: Investigate lessons:add skill API 400 error on beta header
description: The lessons:add skill repeatedly fails with: API Error: 400 - Unexpected value(s) effort-2025-11-24, tool-search-tool-2025-10-19, web-search-2025-03-05 for the anthropic-beta header. This has happened at least 5 times. Need to find where the skill calls the API and what beta headers it's sending, then fix or pin to valid values.

title: Add auth check to publish PATCH route
description: The PATCH /api/listings/[id]/publish route uses service role and has no auth check — any caller who knows a listing UUID can mark it published or overwrite listing_urls. Other routes (upload, studio-upload) also skip auth but this is the most consequential mutation. Decide: add getUser() check from SSR client + verify listing ownership, or accept as-is for solo-use app.
close_reason: Auth guard added in commit b1c60db — getUser() check + 401 on unauthenticated callers

description: Each platform has listing policies (prohibited items, title length, image requirements). Store rules URL per platform in settings, fetch+cache on save (refresh if >7 days old). In step4a, inject condensed rules into Claude prompt as constraints. At publish time, validate title length and flag prohibited keywords from cached rules. New platform_rules table keyed by (user_id, platform). Rules URL input added to /settings/platforms.
close_reason: Closed

description: Opt-in scheduled price reduction for published listings that haven't sold. Global settings (auto_discount_enabled, auto_discount_pct=10, auto_discount_interval_days=14, auto_discount_floor_pct=50) stored in user_settings. Per-listing override columns on listings table. Inngest daily cron auto-discount-cron queries eligible listings and applies reduction. New settings page /settings/auto-discount. Per-listing override in FieldsPanel.

description: Incorporate listing age and price-change history into pricing suggestions. New table listing_price_events (id, listing_id, event_type, price_cents, note, created_at). When step3 runs or reprices, check existing events to factor in stale listings. Show price history timeline in EvidenceDrawer. event_types: initial, manual_change, auto_discount, relist.

title: Pricing: methodology paragraph in EvidenceDrawer
description: After step3 computes suggested_price and price_to_move, call Claude Haiku to write a ~100-word plain-English explanation of the pricing methodology: comp count and sources, condition adjustments, speed-to-sell calculation. Store in listings.pricing_methodology TEXT. Display as collapsible section in EvidenceDrawer.

description:
Batch of UX feedback from smoke test:
1. Dashboard needs settings icon to navigate to /settings
2. Reddit: connecting Reddit account should auto-populate Reddit username field (check if OAuth returns username)
3. Poshmark: add step-by-step instructions for extracting session cookie
4. Mercari: add link to where users get their API token
5. TheRealReal: add link to Apify API token page
6. All pages have the same title 'AI Listings' — should be unique per page
7. Workspace: add 'Archive listing' button at bottom-left so users can archive without going back to dashboard

title: Confirm PHOTOROOM_API_KEY sandbox vs production
description: PHOTOROOM_API_KEY is set to sandbox_sk_pr_default_... in both env files. Confirm whether this is intentional (sandbox key is acceptable for production BG removal) or whether a production Photoroom API key needs to be obtained.

title: Add pipeline step retry button to workspace FieldsPanel
description: FieldsPanel should show a Retry button when a pipeline step failed. Requires adding pipeline_failed_step text column to listings table. Once added, surface in FieldsPanel: show which step failed, button calls POST /api/pipeline/retry-step with the step name. The retry-step API route already exists.

title: Add drag-and-drop photo reorder in workspace PhotoPanel
description: PhotoPanel shows photos in display_order without reordering. Add @dnd-kit/sortable for drag reorder. On drop, PATCH /api/photos/reorder with new order array, update display_order in DB. Requires creating PATCH /api/photos/reorder route. Dependencies: @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities.

title: Integrate mcp-exec into research_pricing for data-heavy comp aggregation
description: The design spec calls for mcp-exec Python runtime (pandas/numpy) for statistical outlier removal and weighted median on large comp sets. Currently research_pricing reads existing pricing_comps rows and computes a simple median in-process. When comp sets grow large (20+ rows), mcp-exec exec() would keep the intermediate data out of context and enable proper statistical analysis. Prerequisites: mcp-exec configured in Claude Code settings. See docs/thick-tools-pattern.md.

title: Add TS linter rule to catch step-number and positional naming patterns
description:
We want to catch names like StepNResult, Step1X, handler2, etc. at commit time — the same way wemake-python-styleguide catches bad names in Python. Need to evaluate whether ESLint, Biome, or a custom rule can enforce this.

Research:
- eslint-plugin-unicorn has naming convention rules (unicorn/prevent-abbreviations, unicorn/filename-case)
- @typescript-eslint/naming-convention rule supports regex patterns on interface/type names
- Biome has a noRestrictedGlobals analogue but limited naming rules

Proposed rule: ban interfaces/types whose names match /Step\d/ or end in Result when a more specific name is possible.

Acceptance criteria: committing a file with an interface named Step1Result or FooResult triggers a lint error with a helpful message pointing to use a domain name.
close_reason: Done — Step1Result→ProductIdData, Step2Result→VisionAnalysis across all consumers; @typescript-eslint/naming-convention rule added to catch ^Step\d names at lint time

title: Rename StepNResult interfaces in lib/pipeline to domain names
description:
Each pipeline step file exports a TS interface named after its step number (Step1Result, Step2Result) rather than the domain concept it represents. This is an anti-pattern — names should express what the data IS, not where it came from.

Affected files and proposed renames:
- step1-product-id.ts: Step1Result → ProductIdData (or ProductData)
- step2-vision-analysis.ts: Step2Result → VisionAnalysis (or ItemAnalysis)

Downstream consumers (intake-pipeline.ts, step3-pricing-research.ts, step4a-draft-listing.ts, step5-auth-plan.ts, retry-step.ts) import and use these types and will need to be updated.

Run tsc --noEmit after renaming to confirm no broken references.
close_reason: Done — Step1Result→ProductIdData, Step2Result→VisionAnalysis across all consumers; @typescript-eslint/naming-convention rule added to catch ^Step\d names at lint time
